description_long: This is a modern motor yacht with a streamlined white hull and a raised cabin structure, floating on a calm blue water surface. The yacht features a spacious aft deck with a wooden finish, surrounded by metal railings for safety. The main cabin has large windows on both sides, providing ample natural light and visibility for those inside. The bow area is open and accessible, with a sleek, rounded shape and additional railings. The upper deck includes a flybridge or helm station, partially enclosed by the cabin structure. The overall design is elegant and functional, suitable for leisure cruising in urban marinas or waterfronts.
description: A sleek white motor yacht with a raised cabin, wooden aft deck, and metal railings, floating on blue water. The design is modern and spacious, ideal for leisure cruising.
description_view_0: Side view showing the yacht's full length, raised cabin, wooden aft deck, and metal railings.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded bow, open foredeck, and forward cabin windows.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the yacht's profile, cabin windows, and aft deck details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the wooden aft deck, entry steps, and the back of the cabin structure.
attribute_hull_design: Monohull with a deep-V profile, smooth white finish, rounded bow, and no visible keels or chines. The hull is unmarked and features a clean, modern look.
attribute_deck_layout: Single main deck with a spacious aft area finished in wood, surrounded by metal railings. The foredeck is open and accessible, with walkways along both sides of the raised cabin. The upper deck includes a flybridge or helm station integrated into the cabin structure.
attribute_cabin_structure: One main raised cabin located amidships, featuring large side windows and a streamlined exterior. The cabin has a flat roof and appears to have an entry at the rear, with no visible doors or hatches on the sides.
